questions: Какой минимальный organ_contract для Inquisition v0.1 гарантирует no-fake-green audit?
Какие проверки обязательны перед READY_FOR_AGENT для первого self-build organ?
Как декомпозировать этапы так, чтобы каждая стадия имела проверяемые receipts?
Какие рекомендации из raw advisory должны быть owner-gated до modernization?
constraints: Advisory is not doctrine until reconciled
No READY_FOR_AGENT without explicit evidence and owner approval
required_response_format: Use ORGANS/ASTRONOMICON/REGISTRY/ADVISORY_RESPONSES/* with schema advisory_response.schema.json and map accepted/rejected recommendations explicitly.
no_fake_green_rules: Do not declare READY_FOR_AGENT in review response
Provide blockers instead of optimistic PASS claims
